---
title: "CausalML Notebooks by Topic"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

This index organizes all Quarto notebooks in this folder **by topic** for easier discovery. Notebooks are grouped by methodological similarity.

## Meta-learners (S-, T-, X-, R-Learners)

Core tutorials and benchmarks for meta-learner estimation of CATE/ATE.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [01-meta-learners-training-estimation-validation-visualization.qmd](01-meta-learners-training-estimation-validation-visualization.qmd) | Meta-learners with synthetic data: training, ATE/CATE estimation, validation, visualization |
| [03-meta-learners-single-multiple-treatment.qmd](03-meta-learners-single-multiple-treatment.qmd) | S-, T-, X-, R-Learners for single and multiple treatment arms |
| [16-meta-learners-benchmark-nie-wager.qmd](16-meta-learners-benchmark-nie-wager.qmd) | Benchmark X-, R-, T-, S-learners across Nie & Wager (2020) simulation modes |
| [22-benchmark-semi-synthetic-Schuler-et-al.qmd](22-benchmark-semi-synthetic-Schuler-et-al.qmd) | Meta-learner benchmarks with semi-synthetic data (Schuler et al., IHDP) |

## Meta-learner vs other methods (benchmarks)

Comparing meta-learners with neural nets, CEVAE, GANITE, and DR/DRIV.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [07-Dragonnet-TarNet-CRFNet-metalearner.qmd](07-Dragonnet-TarNet-CRFNet-metalearner.qmd) | DragonNet, TARNet, CFRNet vs meta-learners (IHDP + synthetic) |
| [14-CEVAE-GANITE-metalearner-benchmark.qmd](14-CEVAE-GANITE-metalearner-benchmark.qmd) | CEVAE, GANITE & meta-learners on IHDP and synthetic data |
| [15-dr-driv-xr-benchmark.qmd](15-dr-driv-xr-benchmark.qmd) | DR Learner vs DR-IV vs X-Learner with synthetic data (including hidden confounder) |

## Uplift and causal trees/forests

Tree-based uplift and causal forest methods.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [02-uplift-trees-synthetic.qmd](02-uplift-trees-synthetic.qmd) | Uplift trees with synthetic classification data |
| [04-uplift-tree-forest-visualization.qmd](04-uplift-tree-forest-visualization.qmd) | Visualizing uplift tree/forest structure and predictions |
| [12-feature-selection-uplift.qmd](12-feature-selection-uplift.qmd) | Feature selection for uplift (Zhao et al. 2020): filters and AUUC evaluation |
| [17-causal-trees-forests-treatment-effects-estimation-visualization.qmd](17-causal-trees-forests-treatment-effects-estimation-visualization.qmd) | Causal trees/forests for treatment effects and tree visualization |

## Model interpretation (feature importance, SHAP)

Feature importance and SHAP for meta-learners and tree models.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [05-model-interpretation-feature-importance-shap.qmd](05-model-interpretation-feature-importance-shap.qmd) | Feature importance and SHAP for S-, T-, X-, R-Learners and uplift trees |
| [18-causal-trees-interpretation-feature-importance-SHAP.qmd](18-causal-trees-interpretation-feature-importance-SHAP.qmd) | Causal trees/forests interpretation with feature importance and SHAP |

## Uplift curves and validation

Uplift/gain curves, TMLE-based validation, Qini curves.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [06-uplift-curves-tmle.qmd](06-uplift-curves-tmle.qmd) | Uplift curves with TMLE (validation with/without ground truth) |
| [20-qini-curves-multiple-costly-treatments-arms.qmd](20-qini-curves-multiple-costly-treatments-arms.qmd) | Qini curves with multiple costly treatment arms |

## Instrumental variables and Double ML

IV, 2SLS, DML, OrthoIV, DRIV, dynamic and weighted DML.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [08-IV-2SLS-NLSYM.qmd](08-IV-2SLS-NLSYM.qmd) | 2SLS with NLSYM and synthetic datasets |
| [23-double-machine-learning-usecases-examples.qmd](23-double-machine-learning-usecases-examples.qmd) | DML use cases: single/multiple treatment, synthetic and observational data |
| [24-orthoiv-driv-use-cases-examples.qmd](24-orthoiv-driv-use-cases-examples.qmd) | OrthoIV and DRIV: ATE and heterogeneous CATE with instruments |
| [25-dynamic-double-ml.qmd](25-dynamic-double-ml.qmd) | Dynamic Double ML for panel/sequential treatments |
| [26-weighted-double-ml.qmd](26-weighted-double-ml.qmd) | Weighted DML: summarized data and interpretability (LinearDML, CausalForestDML) |

## Counterfactual reasoning and policy learning

Unit selection, value estimation, and policy learners.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [10-counterfactual-unit-selection.qmd](10-counterfactual-unit-selection.qmd) | Unit selection based on counterfactual logic (Li & Pearl 2019) |
| [11-counterfactual-value-estimation.qmd](11-counterfactual-value-estimation.qmd) | Counterfactual value estimation with conversion/impression costs |
| [13-policy-learner-binary-treatment.qmd](13-policy-learner-binary-treatment.qmd) | Policy learner (Athey & Wager 2018) for binary treatment |

## Sensitivity and calibration

Robustness checks and propensity calibration.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [09-sensitivity-analysis.qmd](09-sensitivity-analysis.qmd) | Sensitivity analysis: placebo treatment, random cause, subset, selection bias, random replace |
| [21-propensity-calibration.qmd](21-propensity-calibration.qmd) | Propensity score calibration (e.g. isotonic/sigmoid) |

## Data generation

Synthetic and semi-synthetic data for uplift/causal ML.

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [19-logistic-regression-data-generation-uplift-classification.qmd](19-logistic-regression-data-generation-uplift-classification.qmd) | Logistic-regression-based data generation for uplift classification |

---

*To render a notebook from the package root:  
`quarto render inst/examples/Notebook/<filename>.qmd`*
